content.en:
"Not good!"

Long Shu realized that something was wrong, this raiding team obviously expected that their warband had an ancient demon-level existence, and therefore also an ancient demon-level existence.

And the strength of this ancient demon-level existence is much stronger than him, even if he is suppressed by the Huoxi space-time battlefield, he is still stronger than him.

"Run!"

Long Shu shouted at Ye Tian.

Even if he knew that Ye Tian's strength was extremely strong, the number of enemies was unknown, and there was also a very, extremely terrifying emperor-level existence, and it was even possible that there was more than one ancient demon-level existence.

Even if it is Ye Tian, he may only be able to protect himself, but he can't protect other emperors.

If the emperor level here all fell except for Ye Tian, it would be a huge loss for the Dragon Disciple Tribe.

When the time comes, maybe the emperor will have to be sent over.

Whew!!

More than sixty emperor-level appeared, all of them were not the emperor level of the main department of Arrow, but from another main department-the main department of Dom!

The strength of these emperors of the main department of Dom is very strong, much stronger than the other emperors of the dragon disciple tribe, and there are more of them.

Moreover, 06, another ancient demon-level existence appeared, besieging the Dragon Ancient Demon.

"Kill!"

The emperors of the main department of Dom killed Ye Tian and them.

The other emperors were very frightened and looked at Ye Tian one after another, and now only Ye Tian could save them.

And Ye Tian did make a move.

Rumble!!!!!

The surrounding ultimate particles seemed to be frozen, and they were all covered by the power of Ye Tian's Ultimate Rule Realm rudiment.

After cultivating for so long, his current Ultimate Rule Realm prototype is far stronger than in the past, maybe the strength has not increased much, but the scope has expanded too much.

Now, this void is under the suppression of his Ultimate Rule Realm prototype.

Suppressed by the rudiments of the Ultimate Rule Realm, the strength of these emperor-level was suppressed, and the speed became extremely slow.

Immediately afterwards, Ye Tian cast the blade of the Arrowmu.

Puff puff puff!!!!

A famous emperor-level was killed by Ye Tian, and the most powerful emperor-level among them, he was the one who shot before, and he should have the strength of the emperor list, but he was weaker than Wei.

At this time, this Emperor List powerhouse also performed a special form secret method, which should be a form that increases the strength and strength of the body.

But this form still can't stop Ye Tian's knife.

Poof!!!

The blade of Aromu slashed with a single sword, and this emperor list powerhouse was directly killed.

This Emperor List powerhouse fell, and the two ancient demon-level existences were shocked and dumbfounded, and immediately became furious.

"Damn, you actually killed Yang !!!"

Immediately, these two ancient demon-level existences killed Ye Tian, and Ye Tian immediately urged the True Lin Form.

Thundered!!!

Ye Tian fought with these two ancient demon-level existences with his own strength, and he did not fall behind in the slightest.

If he was in the outside world, it would be impossible for him to defeat an Ancient Demon-level existence, but in the Huoxi Time and Space Battlefield, the strength of an Ancient Demon-level existence could not be exerted much, and it was impossible to defeat him at all.

"Great!"

The Dragon Ancient Demon was pleasantly surprised, he didn't expect Ye Tian to be able to beat these two Ancient Demon level existences.

Immediately, he also joined the battle.

Soon, one of the Ancient Demon-level beings in Dom's main headquarters was injured and could not withstand the attacks of the Arrowmu's Blade and the rudimentary power of the Ultimate Rule Realm.

Immediately afterward, they fled.

Ye Tian didn't chase and kill these two ancient demon-level existences, after all, it was still too difficult to kill ancient demon-level existences.

Unless Ye Tian was able to comprehend the true Ultimate Rule Realm at the emperor level, or cultivate the True Lin Form to the second form, would he have any hope of killing an ordinary Ancient Demon-level powerhouse on the Huoxi Time and Space Battlefield!

......

Subsequently, Ye Tian and the others returned to the Aromu Fortress.

When they returned, they breathed a sigh of relief.

Sometimes, it is not necessarily that there is no danger in the simple task, and you may be attacked along the way.

After all, killing an emperor level will have a reward for battle points, and the same should be true for other main departments, so they themselves have a certain value.

After this incident, they were even more careful, and they definitely didn't run too far until their strength was improved.

......

"This time, I have gained a lot of records, especially the emperor list powerhouse I killed, who actually gave me 5,000 points of record!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

If he killed an Ancient Demon-level being, how many battles would he get?

He doesn't know, but he can give it a try when he becomes stronger in the future.

With the completion of this group mission, the Dragons Warband had another 1,000 years of rest in the Ancient Demon Era.

Of course, they can also go on to complete group tasks.

It's just that the other emperor-level and even ancient demon-level existences of the Dragon Disciple Wargroup naturally don't want to continue to do the task.

Ye Tian did not lack battle points for the time being, and he also continued to practice in retreat.

And just like that, another period of time passed.

At this time, Ye Tian's cultivation had improved a lot, and he had now reached the peak limit realm of the emperor level.

It stands to reason that it is okay for him to impact the Ancient Demon-level existence now, but he is not in a hurry to impact the Ancient Demon-level existence.

First of all, he wants to enter the Emperor 860 list, if he enters the Emperor List, there are many benefits, and the higher the ranking of the Emperor List, the more benefits there will be.

If you break through to the Ancient Demon Level, then this benefit will be gone.

Therefore, he is not in a hurry to break through to the ancient demon level!

......

this day.

Ye Tian went out of the Aromu Fortress, and now he wants to kill more emperor-level existences, so as to enter the Emperor List of the Aromu Fortress.

If you want to enter the Emperor List, you must get a total of one million battle points, and many Emperor List powerhouses have slowly accumulated enough battle points over the infinite years to enter the Emperor List.

And this is only one of the requirements for entering the Emperor List, and it has to be reviewed by the Ancient Demon Level of the Arrow Mother Fortress, if you rely on the Ancient Demon Level elders to severely damage some Ancient Demon Levels and let the Emperor level kill them, the millions of achievements that have been collected in this way are useless, and they will not be able to enter the Emperor List.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian walked all over the Huoxi space-time battlefield, constantly doing various single tasks, and also killed a large number of emperor-level powerhouses.

Gradually, he gained a large number of record points.

200,000 battle points!

300,000 battle points!

500,000 battle points!

After a long time, Ye Tian finally gathered 1 million battle points, and such a terrifying number of battle points finally shocked the ancient demon level of the Aromu Fortress, and collected Ye Tian's information for the first time.
